steps.title: Find the key context
steps.content: The words “by massive sandstone pillars” follow directly after “supported”—they show what's providing the support, which is the key to the word's meaning.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content:
The target meaning is physical structural support. Choice C, “held up,” directly expresses what pillars do to a bridge—they hold it up.

The other options describe emotional states (cherished), defense (defended), or improvement (improved on), which don't fit a structural relationship.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
